creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 245204
bmd-plugin-hookcmd-2.1.patch

I updated bmd-plugin-hookcmd to 2.1 for a bug fix. The attached
'bmd-hook-cmd-2.1patch' upgrades sysutils/bmd-plugin-hookcmd port.
Please apply to the Ports Tree.

The release note is shown in the following URL.

https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd-plugin-hookcmd/releases/tag/2.1
